title: The Loves of Madame Dubarry
writer: Roger Burford, Paul Knepler, Frank Launder
actors: Gitta Alpar, Patrick Waddington, Owen Nares
plot: Jeanne works at a millinery shop. She is sent to Louis XV's palace with a hat for Madame de Pompadour, then meets a musician at the park and they fall in love, despite the fortune-teller announcing she will become rich and live in...
